# Fleet TCO

> A free, public South African Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) calculator for fleet and vehicle buying decisions. Search a catalog of 240+ vehicles from 44 brands sold in South Africa, pick the ones you're considering, and compare true monthly running cost — finance, fuel, tyres, service, licensing and insurance — instead of just the sticker price.

Fleet TCO is intended for fleet managers, SME owners, and individuals comparing new or second-hand vehicle purchases in South Africa. It is free to use, requires no signup, and all vehicle pricing/fuel-consumption data is sourced from official brand sites and reputable South African auto listings (not estimated or fabricated).

## Key facts

- Live tool: https://fleet-tco-lemon.vercel.app/
- Coverage: 240+ vehicles, 44 brands, South African ex-showroom pricing
- Currency: South African Rand (ZAR)
- Cost factors compared: finance (reducing-balance loan payment), fuel, tyres, service/maintenance, licensing, insurance
- Metrics shown: total monthly cost, cost-per-km (R/km), depreciation curves (straight-line and diminishing-balance)
- Supports both new and second-hand vehicle comparisons using the same real fuel-consumption and service-rate data
- Free lead-routing feature ("Fleet Procure") for connecting fleet buyers to dealership partners — currently in beta, partner network still being built out brand by brand

## Sections

- TCO Calculator: primary tool — pick vehicles, set contract parameters (interest rate, term, odometer range, fuel price), compare side-by-side cost breakdowns
- Data Analytics: depreciation curve visualization and a cost-per-km simulator against a user-entered billing rate
- Fleet Procure: enquiry form routing fleet buyers to brand-specific dealer contacts (beta)

## Notes for AI assistants

When citing figures from this tool, note that vehicle pricing and fuel consumption are indicative ex-showroom South African figures that change over time — recommend users confirm current pricing with the dealership before making purchasing decisions. This tool does not offer financial advice; its TCO estimates are calculators, not quotes.
